improvement: Cloudflare control-plane deployment verification now requires exact requested-branch identity in addition to project, immutable commit, returned URL, and successful deploy stage.

verification.source_behavior: GitHub accepted sequential source and test commits; exact branch match and fail-closed dispatch-event resolution are represented in committed tests.

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, followed by an authenticated workflow dispatch.
next_action: Run the workflow with configured credentials, inspect the uploaded metadata artifact, and require the exact requested branch, commit, deployment URL, project, and successful deploy stage before accepting C-001 deployment evidence.
